tagline: Expert Pool & Spa Services in St. Louis

hero.headline: 36 Years Keeping St. Louis Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: For over three decades, owner Scott Hill and his team have been the name St. Louis families trust for pool and spa care. From weekly cleaning to complex repairs, we handle it all so you can just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to full construction, Advanced Pool & Spa handles every aspect of pool ownership so you never have to juggle multiple contractors.

cards.title: Pool Repair & Equipment
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of plumbing leaks, structural issues, pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Weekly Cleaning & Chemistry
cards.description: Professional weekly cleaning with precise chemical balancing to keep your water crystal clear and safe. Skimming, vacuuming, filter care, and detailed service reports.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Seasonal opening services including cover removal, equipment startup, and chemistry balancing. Thorough winterization to protect your investment through Missouri winters.

cards.title: Liner Replacement
cards.description: Precise measurements and expert vinyl liner installations for pools of all shapes and sizes. We help you choose the perfect pattern and handle the entire process.

cards.title: Swim Spa Sales & Service
cards.description: Complete swim spa support from sales consultation and delivery to ongoing maintenance and repairs. Find the perfect unit and keep it running at peak performance.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: From initial design concept through final build, we create the backyard oasis you have always envisioned. Full project management from start to first splash.

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool or spa. Scott or a team member will provide an honest, no-pressure assessment within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments required.

steps.title: We Diagnose & Deliver
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on schedule, fully equipped. Owner Scott Hill personally oversees complex jobs to make sure every detail is handled right the first time.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and worry-free all season. With 36 years of expertise behind every visit, you can trust that your pool is in the best hands in St. Louis.

about.label: Why St. Louis Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated Since 1990 — That Makes All the Difference
about.description: When Scott Hill founded Advanced Pool & Spa in 1990, he made a promise: every customer gets the same care he would want for his own pool. Thirty-six years later, that promise still drives everything we do. Our small team of 6 certified professionals means you get personalized attention, not a revolving door of strangers. Scott still personally diagnoses complex issues and stands behind every job with an A+ BBB rating.

features.title: Owner On Every Complex Job
features.description: Scott Hill personally handles tough diagnostics and oversees major repairs. You deal with the owner, not a call center.

features.title: Small Team, Big Accountability
features.description: With just 6 dedicated professionals, we know your pool by heart. No rotating crews, no missed details, no excuses.

features.title: 36 Years of Proven Results
features.description: Since 1990, thousands of St. Louis families have trusted us with their pools. Our longevity is our strongest reference.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get an honest quote for exactly what your pool needs. No upselling, no hidden fees — just fair pricing from a company that has been doing this for 36 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service we perform, call Scott directly and we will come back to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 36 years on standing behind our work, and we are not about to stop now. Your satisfaction is not just a policy — it is how we have stayed in business since 1990.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent repair needs, we do our best to offer same-day or next-day response. Call us at 636-938-3080 and we will work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we take care of everything while you are away. After each visit, you will know exactly what was done and the current state of your water chemistry.

faqs.question: What sets you apart from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Owner Scott Hill has been in the pool business for over 36 years. When you call, you get Scott — not a call center. Our small team of 6 certified pros means consistent, personalized service and real accountability on every job.

faqs.question: Do you work on spas and swim spas too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer complete swim spa sales, installation coordination, maintenance, and repair services. Whether you have an existing spa or are looking to purchase one, we can help from start to finish.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve High Ridge, Arnold, Jefferson County, and the greater St. Louis metropolitan area. If you are within driving distance of our High Ridge location, chances are we can take care of you. Give us a call to confirm.

testimonials.name: Adam M.
testimonials.text: Scott completely transformed our pool experience in one summer by identifying issues other companies missed, including a hard-to-find leak. Finally someone who knows what they are doing.

testimonials.name: Beverly V.
testimonials.text: Scott and his crew are very professional and knowledgeable. They always do great work and I trust them completely with our pool. Would not go anywhere else.

testimonials.name: William W.
testimonials.text: Scott is one of the most knowledgeable and fair pool professionals I have ever worked with. Honest service every single time. Highly recommend to anyone in the St. Louis area.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Just Works?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure assessment from a team with 36 years of experience. Call Scott directly or fill out the form — we respond within 24 hours.

footer.description: Owner-operated pool & spa service. Proudly serving St. Louis since 1990.
